rules.description: Integration must be config-entry based and implement async_setup_entry (no YAML-only integrations).

must: Use config entries as the primary configuration model
reject_if: YAML platform setup without config entries

rules.description: Enforce separation of concerns: API client, coordinator, and entities.

must: api.py contains only I/O and mapping
reject_if: Coordinator performs entity registry writes during updates

rules.description: No blocking I/O in async context.

must: Use HA aiohttp session for HTTP
Use async sleep and async file operations only when needed
reject_if: blocking socket/file I/O in async code

rules.description: Config flow is required and must validate connectivity/credentials.

must: Validate input by calling API client in the flow
Handle connection vs auth errors distinctly
reject_if: Config flow accepts input without validation

rules.description: Reauth support is required when auth can fail after setup.

must: Surface errors in UI and allow updating credentials
reject_if: Auth errors only logged with no reauth path

rules.description: Options flow required when there are meaningful runtime options (e.g., scan interval, units, feature toggles).

notes: If there are no options, omit options flow deliberately.

rules.description: If polling/periodic refresh is used, DataUpdateCoordinator is mandatory.

reject_if: async_update in each entity calls API

rules.description: All entities must have stable unique_id values.

must: unique_id must be stable across restarts
reject_if: unique_id derived from mutable display names

rules.description: Device registry and entity registry usage must be correct and stable.

must: Provide device_info with stable identifiers when device exists
reject_if: No device identifiers for device-backed entities

rules.description: API layer must define explicit exception taxonomy and never leak secrets.

reject_if: Bare Exception used for control flow
Credentials printed or returned in diagnostics

rules.description: Coordinator must translate failures into UpdateFailed and trigger reauth for auth errors.

must: Raise UpdateFailed on transient refresh errors
reject_if: Entities crash on missing coordinator data

rules.description: No I/O in entity properties; coordinator must batch data retrieval.

must: Entity properties read cached coordinator data only
Coordinator fetches all needed data per update
reject_if: Multiple redundant API calls per refresh

rules.description: manifest.json must be valid and consistent with the code.

reject_if: domain mismatch between manifest and code

rules.description: strings.json and translations/en.json must exist and match config flow strings.

must: No hardcoded UI strings in config flow
reject_if: UI text embedded directly in code

rules.description: Diagnostics must redact secrets and avoid leaking sensitive identifiers.
pytest-based tests are mandatory and must cover config flow, coordinator, and entity updates.

must: Test config flow success and error paths
Test coordinator refresh success and failure
Test entity states reflect coordinator data

rules.description: No placeholders, TODOs, or partial implementations.

reject_if: pass used as a stub for required behavior
